author: taratorio
content: <@412614104222531604> I checked `prysm-erigon-1` and `teku-erigon-1`. They are stuck in initial sync with 0 peers in the EL. Looks like this is because the bootnodes list that they have been started with has outdated bootnodes (3 out of 6). Also looks like the other 2 out of 6 are up to date Nethermind ones but apparently Nethermind runs only on `discv4`? Erigon is `discv5` only by default now. Etherex seems to be running both `discv4` and `discv5`. I think for devnets we should be explicitly running only `discv5` and no `discv4` at all.
